race.comment: MISS BOOM (7) is a former South Australian galloper making debut for a new yard in this area. Has brilliant early speed and looks well placed in this line-up. Can hit the ground running. PUB CRAWL (1) scored a barnstorming win last start over 1100m at this track, coming from the tail to get up by a long neck. Drawn for a soft run and will be winding up late. Expected to feature. REVOLUTION RISING (2) raced on the pace to the bend before fading to finish eighth over this journey at this track. Reunites with Danielle Hirini who has a win when partnering. Strips fitter and worth another chance. PRIVATE TENDER (4) is a former NSW galloper having first run for a new yard. Goes well fresh and must be kept very safe. BOSS SHELBY (3) ran a fair fourth last time out over 1000m at this track, beaten 3 lengths, after a win the start prior. The 1100m is the concern but has the ability.
